source: Insta360 Go 3S head-mounted camera, Tallmilan 2026 stage start
description: Audio from 'Are you ready' through start beep and a few shots into the stage.
beep_time_method: rise-foot of the 3047.5 Hz timer tone: walk backward from the bandpass envelope's peak while the envelope stays >= 5% of peak. Same 'leading edge' definition as shot_detect, so beep and shot timestamps share consistent peak-relative semantics and any constant detection bias cancels in inter-shot splits.
